# Fragment Lua API - Complete Reference
# Version 1.0
# Generated Documentation

This is the complete reference for the Fragment Lua scripting API.

## GETTING STARTED

Fragment provides a powerful Lua scripting engine with:
- Game object manipulation (Instance system)
- Low-level drawing (shapes, text, lines)
- Interactive UI widgets
- Global services (Players, Workspace, Lighting, RunService)

All Lua code runs in a sandboxed environment with external emulation of Roblox-like APIs.

---

## LUA VM - Script Execution

Namespace: lua_vm

### bool initialize()
Initializes the Lua virtual machine.
Returns: true if successful, false otherwise.
Must be called before executing any scripts.

### void shutdown()
Gracefully shuts down the Lua VM and releases resources.

### bool is_ready()
Checks if the Lua VM is initialized and ready.
Returns: true if ready, false otherwise.

### bool execute_string(const std::string& script, const std::string& chunk_name = "lua_script")
Executes Lua code from a string.
Parameters:
  - script (string): Lua code to execute
  - chunk_name (string, optional): Debug name for the code chunk
Returns: true if execution succeeded, false on error.

### bool execute_file(const std::filesystem::path& file_path)
Executes Lua code from a file.
Parameters:
  - file_path (path): Full path to .lua file
Returns: true if execution succeeded, false if file not found or has errors.

### void on_frame(float delta_time)
Called every frame to update Lua state. Call from your main game loop.
Parameters:
  - delta_time (float): Time elapsed since last frame in seconds

### void render_editor_window(bool menu_has_frame, const ImVec2& menu_pos, const ImVec2& menu_size)
Renders the Lua editor window in ImGui.
Parameters:
  - menu_has_frame (bool): Whether the menu has a frame
  - menu_pos (ImVec2): Position on screen
  - menu_size (ImVec2): Size of the window

### void render_console_window(bool menu_has_frame, const ImVec2& menu_pos, const ImVec2& menu_size)
Renders the Lua console window in ImGui.

---

## INSTANCE SYSTEM - Game Objects

Namespace: sandbox

All game objects inherit from the instance base class.
Instances form a hierarchical parent-child tree structure.

### Basic Properties

std::string get_name() const
Gets the instance name.

void set_name(const std::string& name)
Sets the instance name.

std::string get_class_name() const
Gets the class type name.

### Parent-Child Hierarchy

std::shared_ptr<instance> get_parent() const
Gets the parent instance.
Returns: Parent instance or nullptr if no parent exists.

bool set_parent(const std::shared_ptr<instance>& parent)
Sets the parent instance.
Prevents circular/cyclic relationships.
Returns: false if operation would create a cycle.

std::vector<std::shared_ptr<instance>> get_children() const
Gets all direct children of this instance.

std::vector<std::shared_ptr<instance>> get_descendants() const
Gets all descendants recursively (children, grandchildren, etc).

### Finding Instances

std::shared_ptr<instance> find_first_child(const std::string& name) const
Finds first direct child by name.
Returns: Child instance or nullptr if not found.

std::shared_ptr<instance> find_first_descendant(const std::string& name) const
Finds first descendant at any depth by name.
Returns: Descendant instance or nullptr if not found.

bool is_descendant_of(const std::shared_ptr<instance>& ancestor) const
Checks if this instance is a descendant of another.
Returns: true if is a descendant.

bool is_ancestor_of(const std::shared_ptr<instance>& descendant) const
Checks if this instance is an ancestor of another.
Returns: true if is an ancestor.

std::shared_ptr<instance> wait_for_child(const std::string& name, double timeout_seconds)
Waits for a child to appear with optional timeout.
Parameters:
  - name (string): Name of child to wait for
  - timeout_seconds (double): Maximum wait time in seconds
Returns: Child instance or nullptr if timeout expires.

### Attributes

void set_attribute(const std::string& key, const attribute_value& value)
Sets an attribute. Supported types: bool, double, string, null.

std::optional<attribute_value> get_attribute(const std::string& key) const
Gets an attribute value.
Returns: Optional containing value if exists, empty optional otherwise.

std::unordered_map<std::string, attribute_value> get_attributes() const
Gets all attributes.
Returns: Map of key-value pairs.

---

## DRAWING API - Rendering Primitives

Namespace: lua_drawing

### Drawing Objects

std::shared_ptr<drawing_object> create_object(const std::string& type_name)
Creates a drawable object.
Parameters:
  - type_name (string): "square", "text", or "line"
Returns: Pointer to created drawing_object or nullptr on failure.

std::shared_ptr<drawing_object> find_object(int object_id)
Finds a drawable object by ID.
Returns: Pointer to object or nullptr if not found.

bool remove_object(int object_id)
Removes a drawable object.
Returns: true if removed, false otherwise.

void clear_all()
Removes all drawable objects.

void render_all()
Renders all visible drawable objects to screen.

### Drawing Object Properties

All drawable objects have these properties:

id (int): Unique identifier
type (object_type): Type of drawing object
removed (bool): Whether the object is removed
visible (bool): Show/hide flag
color (color_value): RGBA color
transparency (float): Alpha transparency (0.0 - 1.0)
thickness (float): Line/border thickness
z_index (int): Drawing order (higher = on top)
position (vector2_value): X, Y screen coordinates
size (vector2_value): Width and height
filled (bool): Whether shape is filled
text (string): Text content (for text objects)
text_size (float): Font size in pixels
center (bool): Center alignment for text
from (vector2_value): Start point for lines
to (vector2_value): End point for lines

### Structures

struct color_value
{
	float r = 1.0f;   // Red (0.0 - 1.0)
	float g = 1.0f;   // Green (0.0 - 1.0)
	float b = 1.0f;   // Blue (0.0 - 1.0)
	float a = 1.0f;   // Alpha (0.0 - 1.0)
};

struct vector2_value
{
	float x = 0.0f;
	float y = 0.0f;
};

enum class object_type
{
	unknown,
	square,
	text,
	line
};

---

## UI WIDGET SYSTEM - Interactive Controls

Namespace: lua_ui

### Tab Management

int create_tab(const std::string& name)
Creates a new UI tab.
Returns: Tab ID or negative value on failure.

bool remove_tab(int tab_id)
Removes a tab and all its widgets.
Returns: true if successful.

bool set_tab_name(int tab_id, const std::string& name)
Renames a tab.
Returns: true if successful.

bool find_tab_id_by_name(const std::string& name, int& out_tab_id)
Finds a tab by name.
Returns: true if found, false otherwise.

std::vector<tab_descriptor> get_tabs_snapshot()
Gets all current tabs.
Returns: Vector of tab descriptors.

void clear_tab_widgets(int tab_id)
Removes all widgets from a tab.

### Widget Types

CHECKBOX: bool add_checkbox_widget(tab_id, key, label, default_value)
SLIDER: bool add_slider_widget(tab_id, key, label, min_val, max_val, default_val)
DROPDOWN: bool add_dropdown_widget(tab_id, key, label, options, default_index)
MULTI_DROPDOWN: bool add_multi_dropdown_widget(tab_id, key, label, options, default_values)
KEYBIND: bool add_keybind_widget(tab_id, key, label, default_key, default_mode)
COLORPICKER: bool add_colorpicker_widget(tab_id, key, label, default_color)
BUTTON: bool add_button_widget(tab_id, key, label, callback_ref)
INPUT_TEXT: bool add_input_text_widget(tab_id, key, label, default_value)

All widget creation functions return true on success, false on failure.

### Widget Values

bool get_widget_value(int tab_id, const std::string& key, widget_value& out_value)
Gets the current value of a widget.
Returns: true if found, false otherwise.

bool set_widget_value(int tab_id, const std::string& key, const widget_value& in_value)
Sets a widget's value.
Returns: true if successful.

void render_tab_widgets(int tab_id)
Renders all widgets in a tab.

std::vector<int> take_pending_button_callbacks()
Gets all buttons clicked this frame.

### Structures

enum class widget_type
{
	checkbox,
	slider,
	dropdown,
	multi_dropdown,
	keybind,
	colorpicker,
	button,
	input_text
};

enum class value_type
{
	none,
	boolean,
	number,
	integer,
	string,
	color,
	keybind,
	boolean_list
};

struct widget_value
{
	value_type type;
	bool bool_value;
	float number_value;
	int int_value;
	std::string string_value;
	color_value color;
	keybind_value keybind;
	std::vector<bool> bool_list_value;
};

struct tab_descriptor
{
	int id;
	std::string name;
};

struct keybind_value
{
	int key;        // Virtual key code
	int mode;       // Binding mode
	bool enabled;   // Active state
};

---

## SERVICES - Game Systems

Namespace: sandbox

### Players Service
std::shared_ptr<instance> create_players_service()
Access player management and information.

### Workspace Service
std::shared_ptr<instance> create_workspace_service()
Access the game world and environment.

### RunService
std::shared_ptr<instance> create_run_service()
Frame-based event handling and timing.

### Lighting Service
std::shared_ptr<instance> create_lighting_service()
Lighting and visual effects control.

All services inherit from the instance base class.

---

## ATTRIBUTE DATA TYPE

using attribute_value = std::variant<std::monostate, bool, double, std::string>;

Supported attribute types:
- std::monostate: Null or empty value
- bool: Boolean true/false
- double: Numeric floating-point value
- std::string: Text string

---

## COMMON PATTERNS

### Initialize and Execute Script
if (lua_vm::initialize()) {
	lua_vm::execute_string("print('Hello')");
	lua_vm::on_frame(0.016f);  // ~60 FPS
	lua_vm::shutdown();
}

### Create UI Tab with Widgets
local tab = UI:CreateTab("Settings")
UI:AddCheckboxWidget(tab, "enabled", "Enable", true)
UI:AddSliderWidget(tab, "value", "Value", 0, 100, 50)

### Get Widget Value
local value = {}
if UI:GetWidgetValue(tab, "enabled", value) then
	if value.type == "boolean" then
		print("Enabled: " .. tostring(value.bool_value))
	end
end

### Draw Shapes
local box = Drawing:CreateObject("square")
box.position = {x = 100, y = 100}
box.size = {x = 150, y = 100}
box.color = {r = 1, g = 0, b = 0, a = 1}
box.filled = false
Drawing:RenderAll()

### Access Instances
local workspace = game:GetService("Workspace")
local player = workspace:FindFirstChild("Player1")
if player then
	player:SetAttribute("health", 100)
	print(player:GetAttribute("health"))
end

---

## FRAGMENT LUA API QUICK REFERENCE

## Common Functions by Category

### Initialization & Execution
- lua_vm::initialize() → bool
- lua_vm::shutdown() → void
- lua_vm::is_ready() → bool
- lua_vm::execute_string(script, chunk_name) → bool
- lua_vm::execute_file(path) → bool
- lua_vm::on_frame(delta_time) → void

### Instance Navigation
- get_parent() → instance*
- set_parent(parent) → bool
- get_children() → vector<instance*>
- get_descendants() → vector<instance*>
- find_first_child(name) → instance*
- find_first_descendant(name) → instance*

### Instance Properties
- get_name() → string
- set_name(name) → void
- get_class_name() → string
- get_attribute(key) → optional<value>
- set_attribute(key, value) → void
- get_attributes() → map<string, value>

### Drawing
- create_object(type) → drawing_object*
- find_object(id) → drawing_object*
- remove_object(id) → bool
- render_all() → void
- clear_all() → void

### UI - Tabs
- create_tab(name) → int (tab_id)
- remove_tab(tab_id) → bool
- set_tab_name(tab_id, name) → bool
- get_tabs_snapshot() → vector<tab_descriptor>
- clear_tab_widgets(tab_id) → void

### UI - Widgets
- add_checkbox_widget(tab, key, label, default) → bool
- add_slider_widget(tab, key, label, min, max, default) → bool
- add_dropdown_widget(tab, key, label, options, index) → bool
- add_multi_dropdown_widget(tab, key, label, options, values) → bool
- add_keybind_widget(tab, key, label, key, mode) → bool
- add_colorpicker_widget(tab, key, label, color) → bool
- add_button_widget(tab, key, label, callback) → bool
- add_input_text_widget(tab, key, label, default) → bool

### UI - Values
- get_widget_value(tab, key, value) → bool
- set_widget_value(tab, key, value) → bool
- render_tab_widgets(tab) → void
- take_pending_button_callbacks() → vector<int>

### Services
- game:GetService("Players") → players_service*
- game:GetService("Workspace") → workspace_service*
- game:GetService("RunService") → run_service*
- game:GetService("Lighting") → lighting_service*

---

## END OF FRAGMENT LUA API REFERENCE

For complete examples and detailed explanations, visit the HTML documentation.
Last updated: 2024
Version: 1.0
